allow: Bash(sed -i 's/^		session\\.ID = session\\.ID$/		\\/\\/ session.ID already set/' backend/internal/store/memory.go)
Bash(sed -i 's/^		msg\\.ID = msg\\.ID$/		\\/\\/ msg.ID already set/' backend/internal/store/memory.go)
Bash(sed -i 's/^		binding\\.ID = binding\\.ID$/		\\/\\/ binding.ID already set/' backend/internal/store/memory.go)
Bash(GONOSUMCHECK=* GONOSUMDB=* GOFLAGS=-mod=mod GOPROXY=https://goproxy.cn,https://goproxy.io,direct go get gorm.io/driver/postgres@v1.26.0)
Bash(GONOSUMCHECK=* GONOSUMDB=* GONOSUMCHECK=* GOFLAGS="-mod=mod" GOPROXY=https://goproxy.cn,https://goproxy.io,direct go get gorm.io/driver/postgres@latest)
